body.title: agent_datacenter: relocate wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py to agent_datacenter
body.result: Code already relocated to devices/discord_bot/ in UnseenUniversity — ticket predates rename
body.description:
Move the existing Discord bot code from wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py into agent_datacenter's Discord device.

Current state: wild_igor/igor/network/ has discord_bot.py, listener.py, proxy.py, system_proxy.py. Discord logic belongs in agent_datacenter/devices/discord_bot/ per the new architecture.

Proposed shape:
- Review wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py for salvageable logic (reconnect, token mgmt)
- Merge salvageable parts into agent_datacenter/devices/discord_bot/shim.py (if they add value over the Phase 4 implementation)
- Add deprecation notice to wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py
- After T-adc-discord-device is verified live: remove discord_bot.py from network/
- Review wild_igor/igor/network/ for other candidates (listener.py, proxy.py may also relocate)

Affected files:
- ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py (deprecate then remove)
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/discord_bot/shim.py (receive salvaged logic)

Design rules:
- docs-in-code: deprecation notice before removal

Scope boundary:
IN: discord_bot.py review + salvage + deprecation + removal; quick assessment of other network/ files
OUT: listener.py, proxy.py relocation (separate ticket if needed; scope that work after review)

Test plan:
- After removal: Igor still connects to Discord (via agent_datacenter discord device)
- wild_igor/igor/network/ has no orphaned discord references
- discord_bot tests (if any) migrated or replaced by T-adc-discord-shim tests
